title: erigeron linearis
intro: Erigeron linearis, also known as the linear-leaved fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Erigeron linearis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Erigeron linearis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
